description: Repos discovered to hold real, ranked latent value. Build-out follows promotion.

repos.thesis: Working LLM-powered Social Influence Simulator (Gemini) + reusable AI social-dynamics coach / network-contagion engine and Three.js cosmology visualizations. Deployable consumer product and reusable estate asset; productization path to ORGAN-III.
